name: Paul & Jenny's Father's Baked Ziti
recipeInstructions:
This recipe is loosely adapted from one that is prepared at the "Cherry Tree Inn" in Henderson, NY... by MR. Paul Read sr.
1. Break up and brown the meats together until just brown. Add the spaghetti sauce and simmer while the pasta is cooking. Add the spices to taste.
2. When the pasta is done, combine it with the meat and cheese in a large baking dish. Bake in a 350°F oven for 30 to 45 minutes.
3. Serve with warm garlic or Italian bread and wine if you like.
